## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Metronome teams to discuss content strategy, production, and review processes.](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [First 8 blogs for Week 1 white paper are live; Week 2 outlines approved and in production](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Scrunch AI and Looker dashboards being set up for content performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Content review cycle adjustments needed: earlier outline delivery, staggered draft submissions](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Leadership social posts require refinement to better match individual voices](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Video content capabilities and potential future expansion discussed](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [8 blogs for Week 1 white paper launched on Metronome's website](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [8 outlines for Week 2 approved and in content production](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Final drafts for 3 potential anchor pieces to be delivered today](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)

### Analytics and Reporting Setup

  - [Scrunch AI dashboard ready, measuring competitive presence vs. competitors over 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Looker dashboard combines Google Search Console and GA4 data, tracking blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Metronome to get direct access to Looker; Scrunch data to be integrated into Looker eventually](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Review Process Optimization

  - [Proposed timeline: outlines by Friday AM, anchor piece draft by Tuesday EOD, rolling updates Wed-Thu](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Long-term goal: 2-3 weeks lead time for content production](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Exploring integration between Airtable (GrowthX) and Asana (Metronome) for streamlined workflow](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

### Leadership Social Posts Refinement

  - [Feedback: current posts feel too marketing-oriented, need more authentic voice](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Action: Incorporate leadership team feedback, retrain models with more personal writing samples](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [For Scott (primary thought leader), aiming for less marketing-like, more genuine thought leadership tone](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Adding CK to the list of leadership post creators](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)

### Video Content Capabilities

  - [Current focus: video cuts from Scott, Garvin, and Cosmo](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Future consideration: 30-45 second ad-style "What is Metronome" video](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [GrowthX team to clarify video production capabilities and potential collaboration model](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sydney to send revised Scott social post draft along with full content drafts today](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Metronome team to provide specific feedback on Scott's voice for model retraining](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Chang to share additional writing samples and internal vision docs for voice training](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Explore using podcast transcripts and video interview transcripts for voice training](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up on expanded video capabilities (via Marcel)](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Continue refining content review process and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Metronome to review and update competitor list for Scrunch AI tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zMyaYydysRMh8t4XsCJkvyGLQd3o4JyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
